# CTF Notes Website

![GitHub Pages](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hosted_on-GitHub_Pages-blue.svg)
![Jekyll](https://img.shields.io/badge/Powered_by-Jekyll-red.svg)

A personal knowledge base for documenting CTF challenges, solutions, and cybersecurity learnings.

## ✨ Features

- **Writeups**: Detailed solutions for CTF challenges
- **Resources**: Tools and cheatsheets
- **Responsive**: Works on all devices


## 🛠 Setup

   ```sh
   bundle install
